text: Indian Medicinal Plant 'Holy Basil' (Botanical: Ocimum tenuiflorum, Sanskrit: Tulsi) is traditionally used for Respiratory disorders, Stress, Antimicrobial. It contains active phytochemicals such as Eugenol, Ursolic acid, Rosmarinic acid, which interact with molecular targets including COX-2, LOX, Acetylcholinesterase.
